features: Eco-Friendly & High-Quality Material: Pretty thick wrapping paper made from 100% recycled, non-toxic, and odorless materials, this pink matte wrapping paper with pearly-lustre is both durable and tear-resistant, ensuring your gifts are wrapped in premium quality

Ample Size for Flexibility: With a generous size of 430mm x 10m (17" x 32.8ft), this roll provides plenty of paper to cut into various lengths and sizes, suitable for wrapping gifts of all shapes and dimensions, perfect birthday wrapping paper for girls and women

No Crease: Individually wrapped in plastic and shipped in roll form, this wrapping paper arrives without creases, making it easy to store and use. The shrink wrap protection keeps it dust-free and scratch-resistant, great for gift packing

Luxurious Matte Finish: The pink matte texture with a pearly sheen offers a high-end look, making it perfect for gift boxes, bouquets, wine bottles, and creative craft projects, ensuring your gifts stand out
